calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Barry K. Tagawa; The Law Office of Barry K. Tagawa; 415-516-1844; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioners Rachel Robbins and Ian McFarland.

No other appearances.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS RACHEL ROBBINS AND IAN MCFARLAND'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM LIEN is GRANTED.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONERS RACHEL ROBBINS AND IAN MCFARLAND'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN is continued to September 15, 2021. No later than August 28, 2021 moving party to file a supplemental brief discussing the propriety of proceeding with this action while another action addressing the validity of the mechanics' lien is pending. Respondent shall file a response, if any, to the supplemental brief no later than September 10, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
